bullet_summary: President Trump said Friday that a U
military has killed Niño Guerrero, the alleged leader of Venezuela-based gang Tren de Aragua, President Trump announced Friday
President Donald Trump has said a "swift and lethal kinetic" US military strike has killed "the infamous leader" of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua street gang

items.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike, Trump says
items.standfirst: Niño Guerrero was killed in a "swift and lethal kinetic strike," the US President wrote in a social media post.
items.content: Niño Guerrero was killed in a "swift and lethal kinetic strike," the US President wrote in a social media post.

items.title: Trump says U.S. military strike killed leader of Tren de Aragua gang
items.standfirst: President Trump said Friday that a U.S. strike has killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, whom he called "the infamous leader" of the Tren de Aragua gang in Venezuela.
items.content: President Trump said Friday that a U.S. strike has killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, whom he called "the infamous leader" of the Tren de Aragua gang in Venezuela.(Image credit: Jacquelyn Martin)

items.title: Trump says U.S. killed Tren de Aragua leader in airstrike in Venezuela
items.standfirst: The U.S. military has killed Niño Guerrero, the alleged leader of Venezuela-based gang Tren de Aragua, President Trump announced Friday.
items.content: The U.S. military has killed Niño Guerrero, the alleged leader of Venezuela-based gang Tren de Aragua, President Trump announced Friday.

items.title: Trump says leader of Venezuelan Tren de Aragua gang killed in US strike
items.standfirst: President says Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores killed in ‘swift and lethal’ military strike with help from VenezuelaThe US military has killed a leader in the Venezuelan street gang Tren de Aragua, Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, with the help of Venezuela, Donald Trump announced on Friday.“At my direction, the United States Southern Command delivered a swift and lethal kinetic strike to successfully execute Niño Guerrero, the infamous leader of Tren De Aragua, one of the most bloodthirsty Terrorist Organizations on Planet Earth,” Trump wrote on Truth Social. Continue reading...
items.content: President says Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores killed in ‘swift and lethal’ military strike with help from VenezuelaThe US military has killed a leader in the Venezuelan street gang Tren de Aragua, Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, with the help of Venezuela, Donald Trump announced on Friday.“At my direction, the United States Southern Command delivered a swift and lethal kinetic strike to successfully execute Niño Guerrero, the infamous leader of Tren De Aragua, one of the most bloodthirsty Terrorist Organizations on Planet Earth,” Trump wrote on Truth Social. Continue reading...

items.title: Leader of Venezuelan gang killed in US strike, Trump says

items.content: President Donald Trump has said a "swift and lethal kinetic" US military strike has killed "the infamous leader" of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua street gang.

clusters.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
clusters.neutral_headline: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
bullet_summary: Iranian foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei had said earlier on Saturday that the date of the signing was yet to be determined, but that it would not be on Sunday
President Trump said the Strait of Hormuz will be reopened "immediately," once the memorandum of understanding is signed

items.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
items.standfirst: The US president's comments come as Iran says an exact date has not been decided, but it "will not be tomorrow".
items.content: The US president's comments come as Iran says an exact date has not been decided, but it "will not be tomorrow".

items.title: Middle East war live: Trump says Iran deal to be signed Sunday
items.standfirst: US and Pakistani leaders predicted a Sunday signing of an agreement to end the war against Iran, with US President Donald Trump saying the critical Strait of Hormuz would be "open to all" immediately after. Iranian foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei had said earlier on Saturday that the date of the signing was yet to be determined, but that it would not be on Sunday. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.
items.content: US and Pakistani leaders predicted a Sunday signing of an agreement to end the war against Iran, with US President Donald Trump saying the critical Strait of Hormuz would be "open to all" immediately after. Iranian foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei had said earlier on Saturday that the date of the signing was yet to be determined, but that it would not be on Sunday. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

items.title: U.S.-Iran peace deal to be signed Sunday, Trump says
items.standfirst: President Trump said the Strait of Hormuz will be reopened "immediately," once the memorandum of understanding is signed.
items.content: President Trump said the Strait of Hormuz will be reopened "immediately," once the memorandum of understanding is signed.

items.title: Trump says US and Iran will sign deal on Sunday to reopen Strait
items.standfirst: Tehran cautions that timing is unclear but Pakistan says agreement to extend ceasefire is close
items.content: Tehran cautions that timing is unclear but Pakistan says agreement to extend ceasefire is close

items.title: Trump and Iranian officials give differing accounts of deal timeline
items.standfirst: A U.S.-Iran deal could be sealed within days, according to President Donald Trump, Iranian officials and key mediator Pakistan, with a memorandum of understanding expected to reopen the Strait of Hormuz
items.content: A U.S.-Iran deal could be sealed within days, according to President Donald Trump, Iranian officials and key mediator Pakistan, with a memorandum of understanding expected to reopen the Strait of Hormuz

clusters.title: New York Knicks win NBA championship for first time in over 50 years
clusters.neutral_headline: New York Knicks win NBA championship for first time in over 50 years
bullet_summary: Reported by BBC World, CBS News, France24 and others

items.title: New York Knicks win NBA championship for first time in over 50 years
items.standfirst: The Knicks clinched the title against the San Antonio Spurs, 94-90, in the fifth game of the best-of-seven series.
items.content: The Knicks clinched the title against the San Antonio Spurs, 94-90, in the fifth game of the best-of-seven series.

items.title: Knicks capture first NBA title in 53 years
items.standfirst: The New York Knicks captured their first NBA championship since 1973 with a 94-90 win over the San Antonio Spurs in Game 5 of the NBA Finals on Saturday night.
items.content: The New York Knicks captured their first NBA championship since 1973 with a 94-90 win over the San Antonio Spurs in Game 5 of the NBA Finals on Saturday night.

items.title: New York Knicks beat Spurs to claim first NBA title in 53 years
New York Knicks beat Spurs to claim first NBA title in 53 years
items.standfirst: Jalen Brunson scored 45 points as the New York Knicks beat the San Antonio Spurs 94-90 on Saturday to clinch their first NBA championship in 53 years. The Knicks sealed the best-of-seven NBA Finals 4-1, taking down French star Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs on their home court to capture their first title since 1973.
items.content: Jalen Brunson scored 45 points as the New York Knicks beat the San Antonio Spurs 94-90 on Saturday to clinch their first NBA championship in 53 years. The Knicks sealed the best-of-seven NBA Finals 4-1, taking down French star Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs on their home court to capture their first title since 1973.

items.title: Knicks clinch first NBA title in 53 years, as Brunson shines against Spurs
items.standfirst: The New York Knicks ended their championship drought on Saturday, winning the best-of-seven NBA Finals series 4-1.
items.content: The New York Knicks ended their championship drought on Saturday, winning the best-of-seven NBA Finals series 4-1.

clusters.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
clusters.neutral_headline: SpaceX and Tesla Will Merge, Merz Says
bullet_summary: Reported by BBC World, CBS News, Bloomberg Technology and others

items.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
items.standfirst: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.
items.content: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

items.title: Elon Musk becomes the world's first trillionaire with SpaceX's IPO
items.standfirst: The SpaceX CEO's fortune on paper now rivals the annual economic output of many countries, according to World Bank data.
items.content: The SpaceX CEO's fortune on paper now rivals the annual economic output of many countries, according to World Bank data.

items.title: SpaceX and Tesla Will Merge, Merz Says
items.standfirst: Tesla investor Alexandra Merz says Tesla and SpaceX will merge. She speaks on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: Tesla investor Alexandra Merz says Tesla and SpaceX will merge. She speaks on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Elon Musk Is the World’s First Trillionaire
items.standfirst: SpaceX’s stock market debut has thrust the richest man in the universe into an unexplored frontier of wealth.
items.content: SpaceX’s stock market debut has thrust the richest man in the universe into an unexplored frontier of wealth.

items.title: SpaceX Shares Surge After IPO Makes Musk a Trillionaire
items.standfirst: After months of waiting, SpaceX is now a public company. The stock climbed 31% above its offering price at at one point on the Nasdaq. Bloomberg's Yahaira Anand was there for opening bell and has more. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: After months of waiting, SpaceX is now a public company. The stock climbed 31% above its offering price at at one point on the Nasdaq. Bloomberg's Yahaira Anand was there for opening bell and has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: SpaceX Makes History With Biggest-Ever IPO | Bloomberg Tech 6/12/2026
items.standfirst: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down SpaceX's big debut in the public markets as shares start trading on the Nasdaq. They are joined by 137 Ventures Partner Christian Garrett, Pegasus Tech Ventures Founder Anis Uzzaman, Laffer Tengler Investments CEO & CIO Nancy Tengler, and Tesla retail investor Alexandra Merz to discuss what it means for investors, the space economy, and the AI IPO pipeline. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down SpaceX's big debut in the public markets as shares start trading on the Nasdaq. They are joined by 137 Ventures Partner Christian Garrett, Pegasus Tech Ventures Founder Anis Uzzaman, Laffer Tengler Investments CEO & CIO Nancy Tengler, and Tesla retail investor Alexandra Merz to discuss what it means for investors, the space economy, and the AI IPO pipeline. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Elon Musk Is the World's First Trillionaire
items.standfirst: It's official: The world has its first trillionaire. At $150 a share, Elon Musk’s net worth is roughly $1.05 trillion. SpaceX began trading on the Nasdaq Friday morning. Caroline Hyde, Ed Ludlow and Alexandra Merz, a Tesla investor, discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: It's official: The world has its first trillionaire. At $150 a share, Elon Musk’s net worth is roughly $1.05 trillion. SpaceX began trading on the Nasdaq Friday morning. Caroline Hyde, Ed Ludlow and Alexandra Merz, a Tesla investor, discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: SpaceX Begins Trading on the Nasdaq After Record IPO
items.standfirst: SpaceX is now trading. The stock sold for $150 in its opening trade on Nasdaq at 11:46 a.m. in New York, 11% above its $135 offering price, and climbed as high as $168.75 in the first few minutes. Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde report. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: SpaceX is now trading. The stock sold for $150 in its opening trade on Nasdaq at 11:46 a.m. in New York, 11% above its $135 offering price, and climbed as high as $168.75 in the first few minutes. Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde report. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: SpaceX Shares Close 19% Higher After Historic $75 Billion IPO
items.standfirst: SpaceX’s first day on the stock market transformed the startup into one of the world’s most-valuable public companies, handed buyers of the IPO a 19% return and turned its founder Elon Musk into the world’s first trillionaire.
items.content: SpaceX’s first day on the stock market transformed the startup into one of the world’s most-valuable public companies, handed buyers of the IPO a 19% return and turned its founder Elon Musk into the world’s first trillionaire.

items.title: Trump says deal to end Iran war will be signed Sunday, as Iran disagrees on timing

items.content: Pakistan's prime minister, a key mediator in U.S.-Iran talks to end the war, said Saturday that a peace deal was closer "than ever before," and could be finalized "in the next 24 hours."(Image credit: Razieh Poudat)

items.title: Iran war live: Trump says deal to be signed today; Tehran disputes timing
items.standfirst: US and Iran appear close to signing the first stage of a peace deal, the two sides differ on when it will be signed.
items.content: US and Iran appear close to signing the first stage of a peace deal, the two sides differ on when it will be signed.

items.title: Iran: Will a peace deal with the US be reached soon?
items.standfirst: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said a deal aimed at ending the war was closer than "ever before" and expected to be finalized within 24 hours. Pakistan was preparing for the electronic signing of the agreement, to be followed immediately by technical-level talks next week.
items.content: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said a deal aimed at ending the war was closer than "ever before" and expected to be finalized within 24 hours. Pakistan was preparing for the electronic signing of the agreement, to be followed immediately by technical-level talks next week.

items.title: As Bay Area hosts World Cup, empty red seats are everywhere at Levi's Stadium
items.standfirst: On Friday, FIFA blamed the empty seats during the World Cup match between South Korea and the Czech Republic in Guadalajara on fans who watched from the concourses. Levi's Stadium staged the Super Bowl only four months ago.
items.content: On Friday, FIFA blamed the empty seats during the World Cup match between South Korea and the Czech Republic in Guadalajara on fans who watched from the concourses. Levi's Stadium staged the Super Bowl only four months ago.(Image credit: Eakin Howard)

items.title: Fans on concourses instead of in seats, claims Fifa
items.standfirst: Fifa says numerous empty seats were visible in the near-sell-out Group A match between South Korea and the Czech Republic because of fans remaining on concourses.
items.content: Fifa says numerous empty seats were visible in the near-sell-out Group A match between South Korea and the Czech Republic because of fans remaining on concourses.

items.content: Scotland's John McGinn says his "scuffed" goal which downed Haiti in their World Cup opener leaves him "beaming with pride".

clusters.title: Anger over planned luxury resorts in Albania, including one linked to Trump's son-in-law
clusters.neutral_headline: Albanians protest against another luxury development on Adriatic coast
bullet_summary: Reported by Sky News World, Guardian World

items.title: Anger over planned luxury resorts in Albania, including one linked to Trump's son-in-law
items.standfirst: Around 200 protesters have torn down fencing surrounding a controversial luxury development in Albania, as demonstrations continue over another planned resort linked ​to Donald Trump's son-in-law, Jared Kushner.
items.content: Around 200 protesters have torn down fencing surrounding a controversial luxury development in Albania, as demonstrations continue over another planned resort linked ​to Donald Trump's son-in-law, Jared Kushner.

items.title: Albanians protest against another luxury development on Adriatic coast
items.standfirst: Fencing removed at environmentally sensitive site, mirroring protests against Trump son-in-law’s projectAbout 200 protesters on Saturday tore down metal and razor-wire fences surrounding a luxury development site on Albania’s Adriatic coast, in another sign of growing anger against construction in environmentally sensitive areas.Albanians have been protesting for weeks against a planned luxury resort backed by a company linked to Jared Kushner, the son-in-law of Donald Trump, near Vlora, which is famed for its flamingos and a turtle nesting site. Continue reading...
items.content: Fencing removed at environmentally sensitive site, mirroring protests against Trump son-in-law’s projectAbout 200 protesters on Saturday tore down metal and razor-wire fences surrounding a luxury development site on Albania’s Adriatic coast, in another sign of growing anger against construction in environmentally sensitive areas.Albanians have been protesting for weeks against a planned luxury resort backed by a company linked to Jared Kushner, the son-in-law of Donald Trump, near Vlora, which is famed for its flamingos and a turtle nesting site. Continue reading...

clusters.title: US justice department approves $111bn merger of Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery
clusters.neutral_headline: Paramount’s Deal for Warner Bros. Is Cleared by US DOJ
bullet_summary: Reported by Guardian Business, Bloomberg Technology

items.title: US justice department approves $111bn merger of Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery
items.standfirst: Deal still under UK scrutiny with new investigation, and could face lawsuit from state attorneys generalDonald Trump’s Department of Justice has decided to approve the $111bn merger of Paramount Skydance, controlled by the Ellison family, and Warner Bros Discovery, the parent company of networks like CNN and HBO.The deal was approved by the justice department’s anti-trust division after months of review, and despite the concerns of many people in the entertainment and media industries who believe it will hurt competition by reducing the number of film studios and – most likely – merging two news networks, Paramount’s CBS News and CNN. Continue reading...
items.content: Deal still under UK scrutiny with new investigation, and could face lawsuit from state attorneys generalDonald Trump’s Department of Justice has decided to approve the $111bn merger of Paramount Skydance, controlled by the Ellison family, and Warner Bros Discovery, the parent company of networks like CNN and HBO.The deal was approved by the justice department’s anti-trust division after months of review, and despite the concerns of many people in the entertainment and media industries who believe it will hurt competition by reducing the number of film studios and – most likely – merging two news networks, Paramount’s CBS News and CNN. Continue reading...

items.title: Paramount’s Deal for Warner Bros. Is Cleared by US DOJ
items.standfirst: The US Justice Department has closed an antitrust probe into Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion purchase of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., saying the deal “is not likely” to hurt consumers or competition in the film and television industry.
items.content: The US Justice Department has closed an antitrust probe into Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion purchase of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., saying the deal “is not likely” to hurt consumers or competition in the film and television industry.
